Cozy Beanie Pattern

Materials

  • 1 skein worsted weight yarn
  • 4.5mm circular needles

Abbreviations

  • k: knit
  • p: purl

Instructions

Part 1: Brim

  1. Cast on 88 stitches.
  2. Join in the round, place marker.

Part 2: Body

  1. Knit every round until piece measures 6 inches from cast on.
